belier.intro: The Moon has swept out of brooding Scorpio and into bold Sagittarius, landing at 5 degrees in your ninth house of horizons, belief, and far travel, and the change in temperature is immediate. Waxing Gibbous light at nearly 78 percent illumination adds momentum to this fire-on-fire pairing, while the Sun at 1 degree Leo in your fifth house fans your natural spark into something more theatrical. Mercury turned direct yesterday, and the mental fog that lingered through its retrograde is finally clearing into forward motion you can actually use.
belier.love: A restless, adventurous mood colors your closest connections today, and a partner who shares your appetite for the bigger picture will feel especially attuned to you now. If you have been overthinking a romantic decision, Mercury's fresh direct motion helps you speak your intention plainly instead of circling it.
belier.work: Big-picture thinking, pitches, and anything involving publishing, teaching, or long-distance plans move easily under this Sagittarius Moon. Say the ambitious version of the plan out loud; the Gibbous light rewards confidence over caution right now.
belier.energy: Fire meets fire today, and your body wants motion, open air, and something to aim at. Channel the surplus into a real goal rather than scattering it across a dozen small distractions.
belier.intuition: Your gut speaks in sweeping, almost prophetic statements today rather than careful detail. Trust the broad shape of the feeling first and let the specifics fill in later.
belier.mantra: I move toward the horizon I actually believe in.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon now rides through Sagittarius at 5 degrees in your eighth house, a startling contrast to yesterday's Scorpio intensity in this same zone of shared resources and deep bonds. Waxing Gibbous illumination near 78 percent still wants to build toward something, but the mood is lighter and more philosophical than probing. The Sun in Leo warms your fourth house of home, and with Mercury newly direct, a conversation about money or intimacy that felt stuck can finally move.
taureau.love: Where yesterday's water Moon wanted confession, today's fire Moon wants honesty delivered with a laugh instead of a confrontation. A partner may surprise you with sudden candor about what they need from your shared life.
taureau.work: Financial or contractual matters benefit from Mercury's fresh direct clarity; a delayed answer or signature you have been waiting on is more likely to arrive now. Keep negotiations optimistic rather than defensive.
taureau.energy: Your steady earth constitution absorbs this fire Moon's restlessness without losing its footing, giving you unusual stamina for a long, ambitious task. Use the surplus rather than saving it for later.
taureau.intuition: A hunch about someone's true financial or emotional intentions arrives suddenly and without the usual slow build. Trust the flash rather than waiting for it to fully explain itself.
taureau.mantra: I welcome the honest word instead of the comfortable silence.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon has entered Sagittarius at 5 degrees directly opposite your sign, activating your seventh house of partnership with a fire energy that feels expansive rather than heavy. The Waxing Gibbous phase, close to 78 percent lit, keeps building toward fullness, and your ruler Mercury, now direct as of yesterday, finally lets your thoughts move at their natural speed again. The Leo Sun brightens your third house of communication, giving your words extra warmth and reach today.
gemeaux.love: A partner's blunt honesty, even if it startles you at first, is worth hearing out fully rather than deflecting with a joke. This fire Moon favors partners who say the big true thing plainly.
gemeaux.work: Negotiations and collaborative projects move forward now that Mercury is direct; messages that were delayed or misread over the past weeks should finally land as intended. Say your position clearly rather than qualifying it three times.
gemeaux.energy: Air feeds fire, and this opposition Moon gives your usual mental restlessness a physical outlet it rarely gets. A brisk walk while you think will serve you better than sitting still with a racing mind.
gemeaux.intuition: Your read on a partner's true motives is unusually direct today, arriving as a clear sentence rather than a vague feeling. Say what you sense rather than filing it away.
gemeaux.mantra: I say the true thing and trust the relationship to hold it.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon moves through Sagittarius at 5 degrees in your sixth house of daily work and routine, trading yesterday's Scorpio depth for a lighter, more restless fire energy around your habits and health. The Waxing Gibbous light, near 78 percent full, pushes you to refine rather than overhaul what already works. Mercury's return to direct motion yesterday means the practical instructions or feedback you have been waiting on should finally arrive with real clarity.
cancer.love: Small daily gestures of care matter more than grand declarations right now, and a partner who notices the little things earns real credit today. Let the fire Moon loosen a routine that has grown too rigid between you.
cancer.work: Your habits and systems want an optimistic tune-up rather than a cautious one. Mercury direct clears a path for instructions, schedules, or feedback that had stalled to move again, so follow up on anything left hanging.
cancer.energy: This fire Moon in your health house asks for movement, not rest; a short burst of activity will settle your nervous system more effectively than curling up today. Trust the urge to get up and do something.
cancer.intuition: A hunch about your body or your daily rhythm arrives as a clear, almost bossy inner voice today. It is worth listening to even if it interrupts your plans.
cancer.mantra: I refine my days with optimism instead of worry.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon blazes through Sagittarius at 5 degrees in your fifth house of romance, creativity, and joy, a fire-trine to your Leo Sun at 1 degree that lights up your whole chart with confidence. The Waxing Gibbous phase, nearly 78 percent illuminated, wants expansion and bold gestures rather than restraint, and this is only your second full day of the season, so the momentum is still fresh. With Mercury now direct, whatever creative idea felt muddled last week should suddenly make obvious sense.
lion.love: Playfulness and generosity define your romantic energy today, and a bold, warm gesture lands exactly the way you intend it to. This is a day for saying yes to spontaneity rather than overplanning the moment.
lion.work: Creative projects and anything requiring visible confidence are strongly favored by this fire trine. Mercury's fresh direct motion turns a half-formed idea into something you can actually pitch or execute today.
lion.energy: Two fire signs in easy conversation give you an abundance of vitality that wants an audience or an outlet. Perform, create, or move your body; quiet restraint will feel like wasted fuel today.
lion.intuition: Your instincts about what will genuinely delight you or someone you love are unusually reliable right now. Follow the impulse toward joy rather than second-guessing whether it is practical.
lion.mantra: I let my joy lead and trust where it takes me.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon has shifted into Sagittarius at 5 degrees, now warming your fourth house of home and inner foundation with an energy far more expansive than yesterday's Scorpio intensity. The Waxing Gibbous phase, close to 78 percent lit, wants your domestic life to grow rather than merely function, and the Leo Sun continues brightening your twelfth house of rest and reflection. Mercury turning direct yesterday brings a welcome mental clearing to any private worry that has been circling without resolution.
vierge.love: Conversations about domestic life or long-term plans favor big-picture honesty over detail-checking today. Let a partner see the larger hope behind your usual practical concerns.
vierge.work: Remote or home-based work benefits from a more optimistic outlook than your usual analytical caution allows. Mercury direct helps a stalled home-office decision or a piece of paperwork finally move.
vierge.energy: This fire Moon in your home sector asks you to expand your space rather than tidy it further. Open a window, rearrange a room, or simply let more light in than usual.
vierge.intuition: A quiet certainty about your home or family situation surfaces today, more expansive in scope than your usual detail-oriented insight. Trust the wide view before you start refining it.
vierge.mantra: I let my foundation grow bigger than my worry.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon enters Sagittarius at 5 degrees in your third house of communication and immediate surroundings, a noticeably brighter and more adventurous mood than yesterday's probing Scorpio Moon. The Waxing Gibbous light, near 78 percent full, wants your words to travel further than usual, and the Leo Sun in your eleventh house keeps your social circle vivid and engaged. With Mercury freshly direct, conversations that felt tangled or misread over recent weeks should finally resolve with welcome ease.
balance.love: Honest, expansive conversation does more for a relationship today than any carefully staged romantic gesture. Say the bigger truth about what you want rather than the polite, smaller version of it.
balance.work: Mercury direct clears the way for emails, proposals, and short trips that had been delayed or complicated. This is a strong day for pitching an idea that felt too ambitious to voice last week.
balance.energy: Your air element catches this fire Moon beautifully, giving your mind and body a matching sense of forward motion. Use it for a real conversation or a short journey rather than restless multitasking.
balance.intuition: A sudden, clear thought about a nearby relationship or everyday situation deserves more weight than you might normally give it. Say it out loud before the fire Moon's momentum passes.
balance.mantra: I speak the bigger truth instead of the smaller one.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon has left your sign and moved into Sagittarius at 5 degrees, now activating your second house of money and self-worth with a lighter, more optimistic touch than the intensity you carried yesterday. The Waxing Gibbous phase, nearly 78 percent illuminated, invites you to build your resources with confidence rather than suspicion, while the Leo Sun in your tenth house keeps your public ambitions warmly lit. Mercury's return to direct motion yesterday finally clears the mental static around a financial or professional decision.
scorpion.love: A partner's generosity, whether material or emotional, is easier to simply accept today rather than analyze for hidden motive. Let this fire Moon soften your usual instinct to search for the catch.
scorpion.work: Financial planning and career visibility both benefit from Mercury's fresh clarity; a raise, invoice, or public recognition that stalled during the retrograde has real room to move now. Ask directly for what you are worth.
scorpion.energy: This fire Moon in your money house wants bold, confident action rather than your usual careful calculation. Trust that one decisive move will serve you better today than three cautious ones.
scorpion.intuition: Your sense of your own worth feels unusually expansive and sure today, less guarded than your typical instinct. Let yourself believe the generous version of your own value.
scorpion.mantra: I claim my worth without needing to prove it first.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon has arrived home in your own sign at 5 degrees, a rare and welcome alignment that fills your first house with confidence, warmth, and forward motion. The Waxing Gibbous phase, close to 78 percent lit, amplifies this new-Moon-in-your-sign energy into something you can genuinely feel in your body, while the Leo Sun trines your ninth house of belief and adventure for extra ease. Mercury turning direct yesterday means your natural optimism now has a clear, well-aimed voice to match it.
sagittaire.love: You radiate an unusual magnetism today, and a partner is likely to notice your renewed appetite for adventure and honesty. Say what you actually want rather than what feels safest to admit.
sagittaire.work: This is one of the strongest days of the month to pitch, apply, or simply be seen; the Moon in your own sign plus a fire trine to the Sun gives your presentation real weight. Move now rather than waiting for a more convenient moment.
sagittaire.energy: Vitality runs high and wants a big outlet, whether physical, creative, or both. Do not let today's surplus dissolve into scattered errands; aim it at something that matters.
sagittaire.intuition: Your instincts about your own path feel unusually trustworthy today, arriving with the clarity of the Moon in your own sign. Follow the boldest true feeling rather than the safest one.
sagittaire.mantra: I trust the bold path that feels most like me.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon moves through Sagittarius at 5 degrees in your twelfth house of rest, retreat, and the unseen, a fire energy that asks you to dream boldly even while turned inward. The Waxing Gibbous light, near 78 percent full, keeps building toward something, but here it works beneath the surface rather than in plain view. The Leo Sun in your eighth house adds intensity to shared resources and intimacy, and Mercury's fresh direct motion since yesterday finally quiets a private worry that has circled for weeks.
capricorne.love: Vulnerability shared quietly, away from an audience, deepens intimacy more than any public gesture today. A private conversation about trust or shared resources carries real weight now.
capricorne.work: Behind-the-scenes work, research, and closing out unfinished projects suit this Moon better than visible action. Mercury direct helps a delayed answer about money or a joint venture finally surface.
capricorne.energy: This fire Moon in a water-adjacent house of rest wants imaginative stillness rather than pure inertia. Daydream on purpose; the ideas that arrive in this quiet space are more useful than they first appear.
capricorne.intuition: A dream or a stray image that returns to you today is worth writing down; this twelfth house Moon speaks in symbols rather than plain statements. Do not rush to interpret it, just record it.
capricorne.mantra: I trust what surfaces when I stop pushing.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon enters Sagittarius at 5 degrees in your eleventh house of community and shared vision, a fire energy that suits your love of bold ideas and collective purpose especially well. The Waxing Gibbous phase, nearly 78 percent illuminated, wants a group project or friendship to grow toward something real, and the Leo Sun in your seventh house keeps a key partnership warmly lit. With Pluto still retrograde in your own sign and Mercury now direct, your inner restructuring finally has clear words to travel in.
verseau.love: A partner who shares your bigger hopes for the future, not just your daily routine, feels especially close today. Talk about where things are going rather than only how things are going.
verseau.work: Group projects, networking, and long-term collaborative visions move easily now that Mercury has cleared. Voice the ambitious version of a shared plan; this fire Moon rewards reaching further than feels strictly safe.
verseau.energy: Social energy runs high and wants a cause or a group to rally around rather than solitary focus. Direct today's momentum toward people who share your actual values.
verseau.intuition: A sense of where a friendship or a community is truly headed arrives with unusual clarity today. Trust the sweeping impression even if the details are still unclear.
verseau.mantra: I build toward the future I actually want with others.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon moves through Sagittarius at 5 degrees in your tenth house of career and public direction, trading yesterday's watery Scorpio depth for a bolder, more visible fire energy around your ambitions. The Waxing Gibbous phase, close to 78 percent lit, wants your professional path to expand rather than merely deepen, while the Leo Sun in your sixth house keeps your daily work and habits warmly energized. Neptune, your ruling planet, remains retrograde in Aries, but Mercury's return to direct motion yesterday brings welcome clarity to a public or career-related decision.
poissons.love: A partner may see and name your ambitions today with more warmth than you expected, and it is worth letting yourself be witnessed rather than deflecting the compliment. Career conversations and love can share the same table today without conflict.
poissons.work: This fire Moon in your public house favors visibility, bold applications, and speaking your professional intentions plainly. Mercury direct clears the confusion around a career decision that has felt foggy since the retrograde began.
poissons.energy: Your usual watery sensitivity gets a welcome jolt of fire today, giving you the confidence to act on an ambition rather than only feel it. Use the momentum before the Gibbous Moon moves past its peak.
poissons.intuition: A clear, almost startling sense of your true direction arrives today, more decisive than your usual diffuse intuition. Trust it enough to take one concrete step toward it.
poissons.mantra: I let my ambition be seen without apology.
poissons.author: Sibylle
